Blocks until the model response is complete and returns the resulting message.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the chat.

connectedIntegrationNames.description: Names of integrations that were successfully connected (e.g. "Neon", "Supabase"). Pass an empty array to skip.

connectedMcpPresetNames.description: Names of MCP presets that were connected (e.g. "Linear", "Sentry"). Pass an empty array to skip.

appliedScripts.description: Names of scripts that were applied.

addedEnvVars.description: Names of environment variables that were added.

oneOf.description: Resolves an integration installation task. The agent asked the user to install integrations, MCP presets, or set environment variables. Send this after provisioning the integration on Vercel.

status.description: Whether the plan is approved, rejected, or needs changes.

content.description: Feedback or instructions for the agent.

oneOf.description: Resolves a plan review task. The agent proposed an implementation plan and is waiting for approval.

questionId.description: The ID of the question being answered.

questionText.description: The text of the question being answered.

selectedLabels.description: The labels of the selected options. For single-select questions, pass one item.

customText.description: Free-form text input, used when the user selects "Other" or wants to add context.

answers.description: Answers to the questions the agent asked.

oneOf.description: Resolves a question task. The agent asked the user one or more multiple-choice questions.

toolName.description: The name of the tool being permitted.

input.description: The tool call input arguments. Pass the exact input from the stopped task.

taskNameActive.description: Label shown while the tool is running (e.g. "Running migration").

taskNameComplete.description: Label shown after the tool completes (e.g. "Migration complete").

userMessage.description: Optional message from the user about this permission.

permissions.description: The permissions to grant. Pass the suggestedPermissions from the stopped task.

userMessage.description: Optional message from the user about the permission grant.

oneOf.description: Resolves a permission request task. The agent wants to execute a tool (shell command, script, MCP call) and needs approval. Also used to resolve environment variable prompts.

suggestedPermissions.description: Present when the agent is blocked waiting for you to approve this tool call (for example, running a setup or migration script). Pass these objects back unchanged as the `permissions` of a `confirmed-permissions` task to approve. Omitted once the tool has run.

type.description: Permission grant type.

input.description: The tool input this permission authorizes. Pass back unchanged when resolving.

taskNameActive.description: Internal label for the in-progress task. Pass back unchanged.

taskNameComplete.description: Internal label for the completed task. Pass back unchanged.

userMessage.description: Optional message associated with the permission.

items.description: A permission the agent is waiting for you to grant. Pass these objects back unchanged as the `permissions` of a `confirmed-permissions` task.

startedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this part began.

finishedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this part completed.

oneOf.description: The agent invoked a tool (MCP, integration, or other dynamic tool). For shell commands, use the "bash" part instead.

name.description: Stable identifier for the action (e.g. "generate_image", "manage_todos", "diagnostics"). See documentation for the registry of known names.

summary.description: A short human-readable summary of what happened. Always populated so clients can render something even without knowing the action name.

data.description: Structured payload for input-requesting actions. Present on `ask_user_questions`, `exit_plan_mode`, and `get_or_request_integration` parts when the agent is waiting on you; narrow by the part `name`. Omitted for actions that do not carry structured data.

id.description: Question identifier. Pass back as `questionId` when resolving with an `answered-questions` task.

multiSelect.description: Whether more than one option may be selected.

label.description: Display label. Pass matching labels back in `selectedLabels` when resolving.

description.description: Optional longer explanation of the option.

questions.description: The questions the agent is waiting for answers to. Resolve with an `answered-questions` task.

anyOf.description: Structured payload for an `ask_user_questions` agent action.

plan.description: The full proposed plan, as Markdown.

summary.description: A concise summary of the plan, when available.

path.description: The path the plan applies to.

anyOf.description: Structured payload for an `exit_plan_mode` agent action.

requestedIntegrations.description: Integration names the agent is asking you to connect (for example, "Neon"). Pass these back in `connectedIntegrationNames` when resolving with a `confirmed-steps` task.

requestedMcpPresets.description: MCP preset names the agent is asking you to add. Pass these back in `connectedMcpPresetNames` when resolving with a `confirmed-steps` task.

anyOf.description: Structured payload for a `get_or_request_integration` agent action.

startedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this part began.

finishedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this part completed.

oneOf.description: A typed escape hatch for agent actions that don’t fit the other part types. Forward-compatible: new action types may appear without API version changes.

items.description: A single entry in the ordered narrative of a message. Iterate `parts` in order to render the full transcript.

parts.description: Ordered list of parts that make up the message. Iterate to render the full narrative including thinking, file operations, tool calls, and prose.

anyOf.description: The reason why message generation finished, including standard completion reasons and error states.

finishReason.description: Why generation ended. Null while the agent is still generating; once non-null, the message is final and safe to consume.

attachments.description: Files attached to this message.

name.description: Original filename, when available.

authorId.description: ID of the user who authored a user message; null for assistant messages.

input.description: Prompt input value (non-cached).

total.description: Sum of input, output, cacheRead, and cacheWrite.

input.description: Prompt input value (non-cached).

total.description: Sum of input, output, cacheRead, and cacheWrite.

usage.description: Token usage and credit cost. All values are zero on user messages and on assistant messages that have not yet generated tokens.

messages.description: The user and assistant messages created by the restore, in chronological order.

schema.description: The messages created to record the restore.
